title: Implement local idempotent Chronik coding memory
goal: Share canonical API/CLI envelopes, import agent-run events exactly once, query by coding context and freeze hash-bound historical cohorts without a long-running service.

acceptance.assertion: API and local importer use the same canonical quality and retention envelope constructor.
Retrying the same event_id records it once and returns an import receipt.
History is filterable by repo, component, operation, outcome and time and is explicitly historical_only.
A cohort receipt binds exact query parameters, event IDs and output bytes by SHA-256.

metadata.outcome: Chronik PR #215 implemented the local idempotent coding-memory path, was hardened against divergent event-id reuse and timezone-offset query drift, passed exact-head local validation, and merged as 16474d542e61e42bc7533d6b575bf243c6a496f2.

validation.full_pytest: 271 passed, 1 pre-existing Starlette testclient deprecation warning

findings_fixed_before_merge: A reused event_id with divergent payload could be silently treated as an idempotent duplicate.
The since filter compared timestamps lexically and could misorder timezone offsets.
The missing-data-directory CLI shortcut bypassed query-limit validation.

acceptance_evidence.canonical-envelope: API and local importer share canonical_ingest.build_envelope; validate-local ingest/readback passed.
acceptance_evidence.idempotent-import: Retries skip byte-equivalent event ids; divergent payload reuse is rejected before partial append under the domain lock.
acceptance_evidence.bounded-query: Repo, component, operation, outcome and timezone-aware since filtering are implemented; historical_only and non-claims remain explicit.
acceptance_evidence.frozen-cohort: Freeze receipts bind query, event IDs and cohort bytes with SHA-256 and are covered by tests.

metadata.verification_note: PR #215 was reviewed against the exact 42,075-byte GitHub patch, hardened on head cd23334f184264581c20e7ddf7f58fd441f04a1e, validated by 271 tests and local API smoke, merged with exact-head protection, and verified to produce a byte-identical squash tree on main. The persistent WGX smoke failure also occurs on main and is registered separately rather than represented as green.
